nodes.name: Psilopogon
nodes.summary: Psilopogon（Psilopogon）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联33种鸟类，如Malabar barbet、Crimson-fronted barbet、赤胸拟啄木鸟等33种鸟类。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Bornean barbet
nodes.summary: The Bornean barbet (Psilopogon eximius) is a species of bird in the Megalaimidae family. It is found in Indonesia and Malaysia where it is endemic to the island of Borneo. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References

nodes.name: 婆罗洲
nodes.summary: 婆罗洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联91种鸟类，包括菲律宾冢雉、Bornean crestless fireback、红头林鹧鸪等91种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。
